prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、软件工程、电子信息/通信、数学/统计等专业社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐，与该校理科招生专业（计算机、软件、统计、数学等）高度契合，推高报考竞争；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；2026年；华东师范大学位于上海市，属一线城市高校，对陕西考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在陕西招生规模较小（16人），地域偏好因素对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3671名、2026年招生计划持平、陕西省物理类考生大幅增加约19.7%、计算机/软件/统计等热门专业持续高热、学校声誉平稳且抖音关注度较热等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年有所加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约3751名，区间3323–4179名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 1475, 2928, 10395, 4934, and 3671 respectively. In 2023, there was an abnormal large backward shift (10395), followed by a significant recovery to 4934 in 2024, and continued recovery to 3671 in 2025, showing a clear warming trend in the past two years, with a baseline ranking of about 3671 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shaanxi was 9 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 16 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 16, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, making the plan factor neutral for competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 29th on the main list, stable in the 29–31 range in recent years, belonging to the top normal universities nationwide with an extremely high level of education. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, no negative public opinion incidents related to East China Normal University appeared in the reputation documents, maintaining a stable reputation. On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranks 28th, rated as 'relatively hot', with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.7 million, indicating a mid-to-high level of attention on short video platforms, which has a moderately positive effect on application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Education, Statistics, and Physical Education received A+, Chinese Language and Literature, World History, Geography, Psychology, Mathematics, Ecology, and Software Engineering received A, and Foreign Languages and Literature, Physics, Biology, and Marxist Theory received A-, totaling 14 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Software Engineering, Electronic Information/Communication, and Mathematics/Statistics continue to be popular/highly recommended, highly aligned with the university's science admissions majors (computer science, software, statistics, mathematics, etc.), driving up application competition. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city university, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Shaanxi candidates. The university's small enrollment scale in Shaanxi (16 students) limits the impact of regional preference factors on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3671, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 19.7% in Shaanxi physics category candidates, the sustained high popularity of hot majors like computer science, software, and statistics, the stable university reputation and relatively hot Douyin attention, competition in 2026 is expected to intensify compared to 2025, with rankings slightly shifting backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3751, with a range of 3323–4179.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3323), prioritize sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
